candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches the detailed revenue figures and is the standard name. Preferred over the duplicative subtotal 'Total Revenue' with identical values.
Backup revenue label with identical numeric values to 'Revenue'; included to handle possible label changes over time.

variables.notes: Using both revenue labels in priority order; later logic will pick the first non-missing per year.

candidates.why: Direct production/materials cost; clearly the best proxy for cost of goods sold on the income statement.
Inventory component, not a period expense; not appropriate for COGS compared to 'Cost of Materials'.

variables.notes: Cost of Materials is treated as COGS/cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related stock-based compensation line; qualifies as an SG&A component and is the only SG&A-type candidate provided.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Only SG&A component available in candidates; no totals involved so safe to use.
No R&D-related candidate rows were provided; treat R&D as zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.why: Primary label for interest expense on the income statement; best representation of XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; relevant interest expense if the main 'Interest Expense' line is missing for some years.
Represents non-controlling interest, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; can serve as a fallback interest expense measure if other lines are missing.
Balance sheet stock of debt, not a period interest expense; inappropriate for XINT.
Equity attributable to non-controlling interests; not an interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list for interest expense: main Interest Expense, then lease interest, then supplemental lease interest. Minority interest and interest-bearing debt are excluded as they are not expenses.

candidates.row_label: Equity unrecognised in the profit and loss
candidates.why: Component of OCI/other reserves; not total book equity by itself.

candidates.row_label: Other equity unrecognised in the profit and loss
candidates.why: Additional component of OCI/other reserves; not total equity.
Explicit total equity line containing shareholders’ equity; appropriate measure of book equity.
Consolidated equity line equal to Total equity in amounts; primary book equity label to use.

candidates.row_label: Equity unrecognised in the profit and loss - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/adjustment item, not full equity.
Balancing line, not the main equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing row; not the equity amount itself.
Represents total assets/financing, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Use 'Equity' as primary book equity and 'Total equity' as fallback; both represent total shareholders’ equity.

candidates.why: Minority interest label on income statement; likely relates to non-controlling interests in profit allocation.
More explicit income statement label for minority interests; suitable for MIB when focusing on non-controlling interest in earnings.
Balance sheet minority interest; best representation of non-controlling equity (MIB) and should have priority.

variables.notes: Priority given to balance sheet Minority Interest as book minority equity; income statement lines included as fallbacks for years/elements where BS line may be missing.
